title: BLIK Experience Context
description: Customizes the payer experience during the approval process for the BLIK payment.

consumer_ip.description: The IP address of the consumer. It could be either IPv4 or IPv6.

consumer_user_agent.description: The payer's User Agent. For example, Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X x.y; rv:42.0).
